creator: eric@camachat.org
text:
Created attachment 175326
Update databases/mongodb32 to 3.2.10

3.2.10 – Sep 30, 2016

Issues fixed:
  SERVER-25974: When WT cache utilization is full, application threads can
                stall for an extended period of time.
  SERVER-20306: MongoDB with WiredTiger may experience excessive memory
                fragmentation, leading to swapping and/or out-of-memory errors.
  SERVER-16801: When updating a field of one numerical type to the same
                number of different numerical type, update operation
                considers it as a noop.
